title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:maxLength
text:
Description:
Indicates that a string field has a limit on its length.
Stability Level:
Stable
Payload:
<non-negative integer>
: This field must be no more than X characters long.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:maxLength=10
MyString
string
`json:"myString"`
}
In this example,
MyString
cannot be longer than 10 characters.
